task_completion.description: The agent opens the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app and navigates to the 'Cancer Drugs' list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the 'Cancer Drugs' list open within the iChart app interface.

task_completion.description: The agent scrolls to the bottom of the 'Cancer Drugs' list to identify the last drug and total count.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the bottom of the 'Cancer Drugs' list in the app, with the final entries visible.

task_completion.description: The agent opens a text editor or terminal to create the output file at /sdcard/ichart_drug_inventory.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing a text editor or terminal interface open and targeting the file path /sdcard/ichart_drug_inventory.txt.

task_completion.description: The agent writes the first and last drug names into the file in the specified format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the text 'First drug: 5-fluorouracil' and 'Last drug: Vinorelbine' entered into the file.

task_completion.description: The agent writes the total count into the file in the specified format and saves it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the text 'Total count: 102' entered into the file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app to find the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent navigating the iChart app's GUI, rather than using a web browser to search for the answers online.

integrity.description: The agent actually viewed the top and bottom of the list before writing the answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent looking at the first and last items in the app's list before opening the text editor to write the results.

integrity.description: The agent manually created and edited the text file rather than running a pre-existing script to generate it.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing or echoing the specific required lines into the text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct total count of cancer drugs is 102. The first drug in the alphabetical list is '5-fluorouracil' (starts with 5). The last drug in the list is 'Vinorelbine' (starts with V).
